name: gestalt
description: Dyne.org Gestalt planning, debugging, testing, verification, and skill-authoring workflows

interface.shortDescription: Plan, implement, debug, test, and verify software changes
interface.longDescription: Gestalt provides structured Codex workflows for software planning, implementation, debugging, testing, verification, and skill authoring. It uses Org documents as inspectable execution plans, helping developers separate intent, implementation, and review. The methodology was developed by Denis "Jaromil" Roio at Dyne.org, drawing on long-term experience in free and open source software engineering.
defaultPrompt: Create or select an Org plan for this task and then ask for approval to start its implementation.
